title: Multiple Working Days Schedules in one Board

posts.author: csorum (csorum@habitatmetrodenver.org)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone have anything that can help us with this issue?

We are a construction non-profit company looking to utilize Monday.com for our construction Schedules. The issue that I am running into is that our staff are on a Tuesday - Saturday schedule, our Warehouse deliveries are Wed - Fri, and other sub-contractors are Monday - Friday.

I am looking for any help (a 3rd party app would be fine at this point) that can help us change the timeline (with duration, lead/lag, dependencies) depending on the resource chosen for that task (staff, warehouse, subcontractor).

We were previously using MS Project which could do this, so for folks familiar with that software, we need it to work similarly.

I have tried the 3rd party app Scheduler PRO but it only sets a schedule at the board level.

THanks!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @csorum

I can help you set up a solution that would allow you to define specific workweek schedules (like Tuesday-Saturday for staff, Wednesday-Friday for warehouse, etc.) and adjust the timeline accordingly, with accurate durations, dependencies, and lead/lag times based on the chosen resource.

One approach I’d recommend is integrating Monday.com with a flexible tool like Make.com or Zapier which could allow for custom automations to adjust timelines based on the resource. I can create automated workflows that trigger updates based on the resource selected, ensuring that each timeline reflects the appropriate workdays and dependencies without you having to manually adjust each task.

This would replicate the functionality you’re used to with MS Project, but within the Monday.com ecosystem.
